positive: A detailed, highly stylized illustration of celestial flora and fauna, featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, crescent moon accents, and geometric constellation patterns woven into the roots of mythical trees. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, utilizing a clean silhouette style with deep blacks contrasted against vibrant jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) and creamy off-white. Linework should be intricate and fine, mimicking engraved etching combined with modern digital art. The overall mood is mystical, harmonious, and dreamlike. Vector illustration style, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, amateur, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, messy, gradients, photorealistic, cinematic, 3d render
